title: Guide to the International Patent Classification (2026)
content: This Guide provides information on the objectives, history and reform of the International Patent Classification (IPC) as well as assistance in the use of the IPC.
snippet: This Guide provides information on the objectives, history and reform of the International Patent Classification (IPC) as well as assistance in the use of the IPC.
sourceDescription: The WIPO RSS newsfeed provides access to the digital versions of our publications, studies and information products.
